signup.heading: Create your Budget account
signup.subtitle: One account, multiple budgets — private and shared.

locale.label: Display language
locale.helper: You can change this anytime in settings.

signup.error_email_in_use: An account already exists for this email. Try signing in instead.

signin.heading: Welcome back
signin.error_email_not_verified: Please verify your email address before signing in. Check your inbox for the link.
signin.error_generic: Sign in failed. Check your credentials and try again.

verify_pending.title: Check your inbox
verify_pending.body: We sent a verification email to your address. Click the link before signing in.

session_expired.title: Your session expired
session_expired.body: For your security we've signed you out. Please sign in again to continue.

auth_required.title: Sign in required
auth_required.body: You need to be signed in to access that page.

request.heading: Reset your password
request.body: Enter your account email. We'll send you a link. The link works for 30 minutes.
request.success: If that email is registered, a reset link is on its way. Check your inbox.

reset.expired: This reset link has expired. Request a new one — they're valid for 30 minutes.

banner.heading: Verify your email to continue
banner.body: We sent a link to {email}. Budget creation and invitations unlock once you verify.

validation.email_invalid: Email isn't a valid address. Check the format and try again.
validation.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.

sessions.heading: Active sessions
sessions.empty: This is your only active session.

confirm.title: Sign out this session?
confirm.body: The signed-in device on {device} will be signed out immediately.

sessions.error_revoke: Failed to sign out session. Try again.

display_currency.label: Display currency
display_currency.helper: Used to show totals across multiple budgets. Each budget keeps its own currency for its own data.
display_currency.error_save: Failed to save display currency. Try again.

locale.label: Display language
locale.error_save: Failed to save language. Try again.

llm.label: AI assistant
llm.helper: Used for the budget setup wizard and insights.

providers.footnote: Phase 1 wires the picker only. STT and LLM adapters connect in Phase 5.

cushion.label: Cushion mode
cushion.help_text: Uses the tighter cushion budget limit for all categories.
cushion.on_toast: Cushion mode on — tighter limits active
cushion.off_toast: Cushion mode off — using planned limits
cushion.feature_help_text: Plan a small financial cushion alongside each category. Turning this off hides the cushion lane everywhere — wallets, category limits, and the monthly mode toggle.
cushion.mode_help_text: Switch the current month to the tighter cushion budget. Reversible at any time.
cushion.targetMonthsError: Months must be a whole number between 1 and 60.

members.revoke_dialog_body: {name} will lose access to this budget immediately.
members.revoke_error: Failed to remove member. Try again.

push.enableDescription: Receive alerts for tasks needing your attention

RESERVE_TOPUP.label: Reserve top-up needed
RESERVE_TOPUP.description: When a reserve needs topping up

CONFIRM_DRAFT.label: Draft needs confirming
CONFIRM_DRAFT.description: When a recurring draft awaits confirmation

CUSHION_BELOW_TARGET.label: Cushion below target
CUSHION_BELOW_TARGET.description: When the cushion balance falls short of the goal

push.permissionDenied: Notification permission denied. Enable it in your browser settings.

danger.archive_dialog_body: It will be hidden from your dashboard. Your data is kept and nothing is deleted.
danger.archive_error: Failed to archive budget. Try again.
danger.delete_dialog_body: This cannot be undone. All transactions, categories, and members will be permanently deleted. Type the budget name to confirm.
danger.delete_error: Failed to delete budget. Try again.
danger.name_mismatch_error: Name does not match. Please type the exact budget name.
danger.leave_dialog_body: You will lose access immediately and cannot rejoin without a new invitation.
danger.leave_error: Failed to leave budget. Try again.
danger.last_owner_tooltip: You're the last owner. Delete the budget instead.

empty.heading: Create your first budget
empty.body: A budget holds your spending plan. Make a private one for yourself, or a shared one to plan with family.

currency.label: Default currency
currency.helper: This is permanent — every entry in this budget settles in this currency.

switcher.label: Active budgets
switcher.helper: Pick the budgets you want to see. We'll remember this.
switcher.first_pick: Pick at least one budget to start.

budgets.verify_required: Verify your email first to create or join a budget.

new.title: Create budget
new.placeholder: The onboarding wizard lands in Phase 6.

shares.heading: Contribution shares
shares.body: Set what portion of this budget each member is responsible for. Shares must add up to 100%.
shares.save_error: Failed to save shares. Try again.

error.already_member: {email} is already a member of this budget.

validation.email_invalid: Email isn't a valid address. Check the format and try again.

confirm.title: Leave "{name}"?
confirm.body: You'll lose access to this budget's data. The owner can re-invite you later.

confirm.title: Transfer ownership of "{name}"?
confirm.body: You will become a regular member. The new owner will have full control.

empty.heading: Nothing here yet
empty.body: Once you {action}, it'll show up here.

error.generic: Something went wrong. Try again — if it keeps happening, refresh the page.
error.network: You're offline. Changes will retry once you're back online.

empty.body: Use + to create your first budget.

onboarding.heading: Set up your first budget
onboarding.subtitle: You're almost ready. Create a budget to start tracking your spending.
onboarding.step_workspace_helper: Pick a name and default currency. The currency is permanent.
onboarding.welcome_body: Four quick steps: set the basics, choose its type, pick optional features, then review. You can change everything afterwards.
onboarding.step2_help_text: You can change this later until you add your first transaction.
onboarding.step4_help_text: Adjust spending limits after you create the budget.
onboarding.resume_heading: Welcome back — continue where you left off

basics.heading: Set up the basics
basics.subheading: Name your budget and pick a default currency.
basics.currency_helper: You can change this later until you add your first transaction.

type.heading: Who is this budget for?
type.subheading: You can invite people later — Shared budgets keep separate share splits per member.

features.heading: Pick your features
features.subheading: Toggle the lanes you want. You can change either later in Settings.
features.cushion_help: Plan a small financial cushion alongside each category so a bad month doesn't tip the main budget over. Turn off if you don't want any cushion at all.
features.reserves_help: Roll unused category budget into a per-category reserve at month-end. Off hides the Reserves tab.
features.targetMonthsError: Months must be a whole number between 1 and 60.

push.enableDescription: Get alerted when tasks need your attention — works even when the app is closed.

dashboard.heading: Dashboard
dashboard.no_budgets_selected: No active budgets selected. Use the budget switcher to pick at least one.

wallets.title: Wallets
wallets.empty: No wallets yet. Add your first wallet to start tracking your money.

search.resultsCount: {count, plural, =0{No results} =1{1 result} other{# results}} for {query}

bulk.confirmDialog: Re-categorize {count} transactions to {category}? This creates a correction row for each.

edit.title: Edit transaction
edit.kindFieldHint: Kind cannot be changed — create a new transaction instead.
edit.alreadyCorrected: This transaction was edited by someone else. Please reload.

fx.stale409Body: The exchange rate updated while the form was open. The new rate is {rate}. Save with the new rate?

rule.title: New recurring rule
rule.applyToFutureHelp: Edits the upcoming pending drafts so they reflect the new amount/category. Past confirmed transactions are never changed.

delete.title: Delete recurring rule?
delete.body: This stops future drafts. Past confirmed transactions are kept.

card.error: Couldn't load summary. Tap to open.

empty.heading: Welcome — let's set up your first budget
empty.body: Create a budget to start tracking spendings, wallets, and reserves.

categories.title: Categories
categories.empty: No categories yet. Add your first category to track spending.

errors.nameTaken: A category with this name already exists in this budget.
errors.nonNegativeInt: Amount must be a non-negative integer

delete.blockedTooltip: Cannot delete category with existing transactions
delete.confirmBody: This will permanently delete the category.

errors.saveFailed: Failed to save the limit. Try again.

spendings.label: Spendings
spendings.title: Spendings
spendings.placeholder: The Excel-like categories grid lands in Phase 4.

section.excludedEmpty: No excluded categories — drag a category here to exclude
section.noCategories: No categories yet — add one in Spendings
section.includedEmpty: No included categories — drag a category here to include

row.dragHandleAria: Drag to move {name} between active and excluded.

toast.saveFailed: Couldn't save reserve. Check your connection and try again.
toast.toggleFailed: Couldn't update reserve status. Try again.

coverNotice.title: Reserve used to cover overspend
coverNotice.body: {amount} {currency} of the reserve you set for {category} was used to cover this month's overspend. {category}'s available reserve is now {available} {currency}.

row.currencyReadOnlyAria: Currency {ccy}. Reserve wallets must match budget currency.
row.dragHandleAria: Drag to move {name} to another section.

toast.saveFailed: Couldn't save wallet. Check your connection and try again.
toast.reorderFailed: Couldn't save the new order. Reverting.
toast.reserveCurrencyRejected: Reserve wallets must be in {budgetCcy}. {name} stayed in {originalSectionLabel}.
toast.reserveCurrencyOnEdit: Reserve wallets must be in {budgetCcy}. Change rolled back.

settings.label: Settings
settings.title: Settings
settings.placeholder: Budget identity, cushion toggle, recurring rules, and members land in Phase 6.

tasks.count: {count, plural, one {# task pending} other {# tasks pending}}

RESERVE_TOPUP.label: Fix reserve
RESERVE_TOPUP.ariaLabel: Go to Reserves to fix top-up

CUSHION_BELOW_TARGET.label: Top up cushion
CUSHION_BELOW_TARGET.ariaLabel: Go to Wallets to top up cushion

tasks.confirmError: Could not confirm draft. Try again.

detail.RESERVE_TOPUP: Your reserve wallets hold {amount} less than the sum allocated across reserve categories. You have two options: top up a reserve wallet (move money in) to match the category sum, or reduce some category reserve amounts so the sum drops back to the wallet balance.
detail.CONFIRM_DRAFT: A recurring rule has produced a new draft transaction for {ruleName} ({amount}). Open the Spendings tab, review the draft row, and confirm or dismiss it. Confirming records the transaction in your ledger; dismissing skips it without affecting future occurrences.
detail.CUSHION_BELOW_TARGET: Your cushion savings are below the target you set in Settings (months × average monthly spend). The shortfall is {shortfall}. You have three options: transfer money into a cushion-type wallet to cover the gap, lower the cushion target months in Settings → Cushion (smaller runway = smaller required cushion), or reduce some category limits so the average monthly spend drops.
detail.RESERVE_TOPUP_withdraw: Your reserve wallets hold {amount} more than the sum allocated across reserve categories. You have two options: withdraw the surplus from a reserve wallet, or redistribute the extra into category reserves (increase one or more category amounts so they add up to the wallet sum).

catSlider.deleteBlockedTooltip: Cannot delete category with existing transactions
catSlider.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete the category.

remove.title: Remove category
remove.body: Choose how to remove this category.

deleteCategory.title: Delete category permanently?
deleteCategory.body: This permanently deletes {name} and all of its transactions, limits and history. This cannot be undone.

noCategories.title: No categories yet
noCategories.body: Add your first category to start tracking spendings.

error.sliderSave: Couldn't save changes. Check your connection and try again.
error.reorderSave: Couldn't save new order. The columns have been restored.
error.fxStale: Exchange rate has updated. Review the new amount and save again.

confirm.discardChanges: You have unsaved changes. Discard them?

deleteTxn.title: Delete transaction?
deleteTxn.body: This will permanently remove {amount} on {date}. This action cannot be undone.

dismissDraft.title: Skip {ruleName} for {month}?
dismissDraft.body: The recurring rule will keep running. Next month's draft will appear as scheduled.

share.copy_failed: Could not copy link — copy it manually
share.generate_failed: Failed to generate share link. Try again.
share.valid_body: You've been invited to join a shared budget.
share.expired_body: Ask the budget owner to send you a new link.
share.not_found_body: This link is invalid or has been removed.

errors.title: Something went wrong
errors.body: We couldn't load this page. Check your connection and try again.

server_down.title: We can't reach the server
server_down.body: Budget is offline for the moment. Check your connection — if everything looks fine on your end, our servers are taking a breather. We'll be right back.
server_down.still_unreachable: Still no answer from the server. Give it another moment.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.body: That page doesn't exist — it may have moved, been renamed, or you might have followed a stale link.

banner.body: Install Budget for faster access and offline use

dialog.title: Why install Budget?
dialog.benefit1: Works offline — access your budget without internet
dialog.benefit2: Faster access — launches straight from your home screen
dialog.benefit3: Push notifications — get task alerts without opening a browser

install.notAvailable: Install not available in this browser

ios.title: Install on iPhone or iPad
ios.step1: Tap the Share button in your browser toolbar
ios.step2: Scroll down and tap “Add to Home Screen”
ios.step3: Tap “Add” — Budget appears on your home screen

offline.heading: You're offline
offline.body: Budget is offline. Check your connection and try again.

unavailable.heading: Not available offline
unavailable.body: This data hasn't been loaded yet. Connect to the internet and reload.

badge.ariaLabel: {count, plural, one {# transaction pending sync} other {# transactions pending sync}}

issues.title: Sync issues
issues.description: These transactions could not sync. Review and resolve manually.

serverDown.heading: Service unavailable
serverDown.body: Budget can't reach the server right now. Your data is safe.

signedOut.heading: You're signed out
signedOut.body: Can't sign in right now due to a server problem. Your data is safe.
